---
name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working as expected
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

```bash
# Minimal command(s) that trigger the bug
envsniff generate .
```

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Include the full error message or output if applicable.

```
paste output here
```

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| envsniff version | `envsniff --version` |
| Python version | `python --version` |
| OS | e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11 |
| Install method | pip / pipx / npx |

## Additional context

Any other context, screenshots, or `.env.example` snippets that might help.
